summary: Promoted ADR 0306 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.115` and platform version `0.130.75` after replaying the exact-main private Gitea snapshot derived from source commit `ef2803b3830cf05bb22128dcfa7860f9002b75b0`. The private main `validate.yml` and `release-bundle.yml` workflows both concluded `success`, the repo-managed Gitea runtime and runner recovery re-established the hosted controller path, and the final integration step refreshes the ADR metadata, receipts, release note, and canonical platform truth around that settled exact-main success boundary.

verification.observed: The settled `0.177.115` source tree was published onto the private Gitea `main` snapshot by creating snapshot commit `8d17ace04285790b0eca9de5415b75967cdfecf8` on top of prior private-main head `a10101240780d755f27988ee7352ac4f7cc74a7c`, preserving an exact hosted copy of source commit `ef2803b3830cf05bb22128dcfa7860f9002b75b0` for mainline verification.
Private Gitea `validate.yml` run `179` / job `237` concluded `success` on `main` after the exact-main snapshot publication.
Private Gitea `release-bundle.yml` run `178` / jobs `235` and `236` concluded `success` on `main` after the exact-main snapshot publication.

The integrated tree retains the earlier direct validation bundle from the settled source commit: targeted pytest (`58 passed in 309.49s`), direct Checkov wrapper scan, `make check-build-server`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed before the canonical-truth refresh, and the final canonical surfaces then passed `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `git diff --check`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs generated-portals` after regenerating stale diagrams.

The repo-managed host proxy, Gitea runtime, and Gitea runner recovery path restored the private controller listener and runner container before the exact-main hosted replay, so ADR 0306 is now recorded as first verified live in platform version `0.130.75`.

notes: ADR 0306 is now recorded as implemented in repository version `0.177.115` and first verified live in platform version `0.130.75`.

The exact-main hosted success boundary is anchored to source commit `ef2803b3830cf05bb22128dcfa7860f9002b75b0`; the final integration commit refreshes canonical truth, receipts, and release metadata around that verified replay rather than changing the settled Checkov automation surfaces.
